text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sh-sh-shut up! What is going on?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
First there was this "whoa" vibe, and then it was
all like "yeah!"

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Then it was like "yasss!" My girls' feels legit came
through!
